query: SELECT id, productCode, batchNo, serialNumber, imei, productName, categoryId, stationCode, productStatus, createdAt FROM products WHERE REPLACE(REPLACE(IFNULL(batchNo,''),'.',''),' ','') = '101300001569' OR REPLACE(REPLACE(IFNULL(productCode,''),'.',''),' ','') = '101300001569' OR REPLACE(REPLACE(IFNULL(serialNumber,''),'.',''),' ','') = '101300001569' OR REPLACE(REPLACE(IFNULL(imei,''),'.',''),' ','') = '101300001569' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT id, productCode, batchNo, serialNumber, imei, productName, categoryId, stationCode, productStatus, createdAt FROM products WHERE REPLACE(REPLACE(IFNULL(batchNo,''),'.',''),' ','') = '101300001569' OR REPLACE(REPLACE(IFNULL(productCode,''),'.',''),' ','') = '101300001569' OR REPLACE(REPLACE(IFNULL(serialNumber,''),'.',''),' ','') = '101300001569' OR REPLACE(REPLACE(IFNULL(imei,''),'.',''),' ','') = '101300001569' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
